text.title: WebSocket Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the workload require sub-second server push AND client→server traffic?

conclusion.verdict: use Server-Sent Events; simpler, HTTP/2 multiplex, resume built in
use HTTP long-poll or move to a stateful tier
use WebSocket with envelope, heartbeat, reconnect-jitter, pubsub fan-out

text.example: Multi-client live cursor product → versioned envelope v=1 → heartbeat 25s — disconnect after 2 misses → reconnect full-jitter capped 30s → Redis Pub/Sub for fan-out → bounded queue 100 msgs.
